resolutionVsPriorRound: Prior round reported REVIEW_CAPABILITY_BLOCKED. Root cause was NOT that spawning is impossible — it was that passing a model override (model: sonnet/haiku) OR using the code-reviewer subagent_type routed to an inaccessible 'deepseek-v4-pro' model. Spawning with the DEFAULT agent and NO model override works.

workingConfiguration.sessionType: default general-purpose subagent, NO model override, NO code-reviewer subagent_type
